---
title: LFRZ-PATTERN
command: LFRZ-PATTERN
category: layer
summary: Freeze all layers matching a wildcard pattern.
appliesTo: [civil3d-2022, civil3d-2024, civil3d-2025, civil3d-2026]
---

> Freeze every layer whose name matches the user-supplied wildcard pattern.

## Usage

Run `LFRZ-PATTERN` at the command line, then enter a pattern such as `C-STRM-*`.
